chapter: Indications for Non-organ-specific Whole Body Imaging

differentials.name: Infection Gallium has been largely replaced with WBC imaging but can be used in chronic infection
differentials.raw: Infection Gallium has been largely replaced with WBC imaging but can be used in chronic infection

differentials.name: Diffuse lung uptake sarcoidosis, diffuse infections (TB, CMV, PCP), lymphangitic metastases, pneumoconioses (asbestosis, silicosis), diffuse interstitial fibrosis (UIP), drug-induced pneumonitis (bleomycin, cyclophosphamide, busulfan), acute radiation pneumonitis, recent lymphangiographic contrast
differentials.raw: Diffuse lung uptake sarcoidosis, diffuse infections (TB, CMV, PCP), lymphangitic metastases, pneumoconioses (asbestosis, silicosis), diffuse interstitial fibrosis (UIP), drug-induced pneumonitis (bleomycin, cyclophosphamide, busulfan), acute radiation pneumonitis, recent lymphangiographic contrast

differentials.name: Lymph node involvement sarcoidosis, TB, MAI, Hodgkin disease
differentials.raw: Lymph node involvement sarcoidosis, TB, MAI, Hodgkin disease

differentials.name: Tumor Neoplastic uptake is variable; prominent uptake is usually seen in:
differentials.raw: Tumor Neoplastic uptake is variable; prominent uptake is usually seen in:

differentials.name: Active osteomyelitis
differentials.raw: Active osteomyelitis (90% sensitivity is higher than for 99mTc-MDP)

differentials.name: Cellulitis
differentials.raw: Cellulitis (bone scan followed by gallium scan)

differentials.name: Metastases
differentials.raw: Metastases (65% sensitivity, less than for bone agents)

context: most benign neoplasms; hemangioma; cirrhosis; cystic disease of the breast, liver, thyroid; reactive lymphadenopathy; inactive granulomatous disease Indications for Gallium Imaging DDx:   normal bowel excretions (must be cleared by enema; bowel pathology shows persistent activity) DDx:   NOT seen in Kaposi sarcoma, a useful distinction in AIDS patients with hilar nodes Useful in: ›  detection of tumor recurrence ›  DDx of focal cold liver lesions on Tc-99m sulfur colloid scan Gallium in Bone Imaging Increased activity in:
